nodes.label: .`isMacOs returns a Boolean and matches isMacOsHost without throwing`()
.`request is idempotent and last write wins`()
.`Permission Denied carries the offending permission and code`()
.`Permission Restricted and NotDetermined expose distinct codes`()
.`Native Unavailable defaults its message and Failure carries a reason`()
.`new error codes resolve to matching StringKeys`()
.`every new AppError code has a corresponding StringKey`()
.`status for Microphone returns a valid status without throwing`()
.`status for every permission returns a valid status without throwing`()
.`permissionStatusToOutcome maps Denied to Permission Denied carrying the permission`()
.`permissionStatusToOutcome maps Restricted to Permission Restricted carrying the permission`()
.`permissionStatusToOutcome maps NotDetermined to Permission NotDetermined carrying the permission`()
.`theme persists across a fresh PreferencesStorage over the same settings`()
.`language persists across a fresh PreferencesStorage over the same settings`()
.`telemetryConsent persists across a fresh PreferencesStorage over the same settings`()
.`test DSL dispatches intents and asserts model states`()
.`test DSL handles mixed model and event assertions`()
.`cleartext http to a non-loopback host is refused`()
.`cleartext http to the android emulator loopback is allowed`()
.`finite transport timeouts are exposed with sane defaults`()
.`400 with a non ErrorResponse body preserves the raw body in Client Unknown`()
.`400 with a matching ErrorResponse body still falls back via status mapping`()
.`domainCodeMapper hook is consulted before the status fallback`()
.`prefersReducedMotion is false on non-macOS hosts and never throws`()
.`load fetches legal document and populates model`()
.`switch locale reloads document with new locale`()
.`load with error shows error in model`()
.`load populates active consents and deletion status`()
.`request export updates export status in model`()
.`toggle consent grants when not yet granted`()
.`toggle consent grant failure shows error in model`()
.`load with error shows error in model`()
.`load checks for pending deletion and shows SCHEDULED step`()
.`load with no pending deletion stays at WARNING`()
.`reAuthenticate sets confirmationToken and advances to REASON step`()
.`setReason updates reason and advances to CONFIRM step`()
.`confirmDeletion calls SDK logs out and navigates to login`()
.`proceedToReAuth advances to RE_AUTH step without setting confirmationToken`()
.`skip reason moves to confirm step with empty reason`()
.`log out triggers logout and sends LoggedOut event`()
.`toggling consent updates accepted state and allAccepted`()
.`accept all grants all consents and emits ConsentCompleted`()
.`loading consents with error shows error in model`()
.`successful login with outdated consents navigates to consent gate`()
.`reset intent clears all state back to initial`()
.`successful login with consent check failure navigates to dashboard`()
.`validation errors show in model for blank fields`()
.`successful registration with outdated consents grants them and navigates to dashboard`()
.`successful registration with consent check failure navigates to dashboard`()
.`submit with empty fields shows validation errors`()
.`ExecuteRemoveMember failure closes dialog and sets error`()
.`LoadDashboard with admin membership sets isAdmin true`()
.`LoadDashboard with member-only membership does not set isAdmin`()
.`AdminPanelClicked emits NavigateToAdmin when groupId is set`()
.`LoadDashboard with system admin role sets isAdmin true even without group memberships`()
.`AdminPanelClicked emits NavigateToAdmin with null groupId for system admin without groups`()
.`LoadDashboard with system admin AND group admin membership gets groupId`()
.`load profile populates model with user data`()
.`validate raises MissingRequiredEnv for JWT_SECRET when placeholder used in production`()
.`validate allows the placeholder JWT secret on a local host`()
.`validate allows a real JWT secret in production`()
.`validate raises InvalidConfig when baseUrl does not parse`()
.`validate raises InvalidConfig when appUrl has no scheme or host`()
.`validate returns Right for a fully valid production config`()
.`production without consent omits the input but keeps metadata`()
.`traceOutputAttribute lifts the last completion to the trace header`()
.`traceOutputAttribute is withheld when content is not allowed (prod zero-retention)`()
.`traceOutputAttribute is null when there is no completion`()
.`postNumericScore posts traceId, name, numeric value and comment`()
.`addItem POSTs datasetName + input to the dataset-items endpoint`()
.`fetchPrompt sends auth + label and parses a text prompt with config`()
.`fetchPrompt throws on a non-2xx so the caller can fall back`()
.`specFor never fetches on the hot path`()
.`specFor falls back to the committed constant before any refresh`()
.`after a successful refresh specFor returns the fetched prompt`()
.`a failed refresh keeps the last-good value (stale-on-error)`()
.`a failed refresh with an empty cache falls back to the constant`()
.`shouldPromote requires corpus, all-pass judges, and the score threshold`()
.`promoteIfPassed PATCHes the production label only when the gate passes`()
.`mean score, pass rate, and allPass are computed per judge`()
.`all judges passing yields overallPass and a high min mean`()
.`suite runs the default judges in order`()
.`allPass is false when any judge fails`()
.`default judges have stable ids and non-blank rubrics`()
.`default user prompt wraps input + output as DATA`()
.`getActiveConsents returns all consent types with defaults for missing records`()
.`grantConsent creates a record and can be retrieved`()
.`getRequiredConsents returns outdated when no consents exist`()
.`getRequiredConsents returns up-to-date when all consents match current version`()
.`getActiveConsents returns granted=false after consent is withdrawn`()
.`email is delivered with correct recipient, subject, and body`()
.`email is sent from the configured from-address`()
.`create group with duplicate slug returns error`()
.`admin can add existing user to group`()
.`user in group A cannot access group B - returns 403`()
.`full invitation lifecycle - create invite, register, accept, verify membership`()
.`RelevanceDetector defaults to false on error - fail open`()
.`executeStructured returns typed RelevanceCheck with real API`()
.`RelevanceDetector correctly identifies general knowledge query with real API`()
.`GET list respects group scoping - cross-group isolation`()
.`uploaded file can be retrieved and content matches`()
.`first acquire wins, a second on the same lock file is refused`()
.`close keeps the window open when the tray failed to mount`()
.`registers preferences handler when the platform reports support`()
.`does not register preferences handler when the platform lacks support`()
